steps.title: Asana (Seating)
steps.description: Sit on a red cloth facing East or North.

steps.title: Invoking Rama
steps.description: Meditate on Lord Rama and Sita.

steps.title: Chanting
steps.description: Recite the Hanuman Chalisa with full devotion.

steps.title: Aarti
steps.description: Conclude with the Aarti of Lord Hanuman.
